title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched AI SuperComputer, a cloud platform that enables AI agents to build, deploy, host, and run real software. It provides an Ubuntu cloud environment with databases, storage, terminal access, SSH, GitHub, AWS integration, custom subdomains, and HTTPS deployment capabilities.
